name: Pine Nut Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, lightly toast the pine nuts in the butter until golden brown.
2. Remove from heat and let cool on paper towels.
3. Cook the alphabet pasta in boiling water until al dente (do not overcook).
4. Drain and rinse the pasta in cold water.
5. Gently mix together all ingredients in a large bowl.
6. Drizzle with olive oil, add lemon juice, and toss to combine.
7. Season with freshly ground pepper and sprinkle with minced green onion and parsley.
8. Cover the bowl and refrigerate until ready to serve.
The Chef's Comments:
"I'm not generally a huge pasta salad fan, but I thought I'd give it a whirl anyway. I made this one to go with BBQ'd hot dogs tonight. We haven't eaten it yet, but it looks intriguing." - Lisa
